company.name: The Fluted Mushroom
company.description: Pittsburgh's preferred caterer, specializing in custom events with tasteful simplicity and elegant design.
company.contact_note: As Pittsburgh's preferred caterer, we pride ourselves on sweating the small stuff to ensure your event is flawless, right down to the last bite.
general_notes: All prices are subject to change.
Additional menu items and seasonal selections are available.
Custom pricing may apply to specialized menus.

stationary_hors_doeuvres.label: Stationary Hors d'Oeuvres
stationary_hors_doeuvres.description: Complete self-serve displays — all components listed are included. No additional selection required from guest.

items.name: Domestic Cheese Display
items.description: A selection of sliced domestic cheeses, garnished with clusters of grapes, served with assorted crackers and mustard dip

items.name: Gourmet Cheese Display
items.description: A selection of domestic and imported cheeses, sliced fresh fruit, crab, artichoke and jalapeño dip, and pesto Parmesan soufflé, served with crackers, toasted pita triangles, baguette slices and mustard dip

items.name: Mediterranean Table
items.description: Housemade chickpea hummus with grape leaves, baba ganoush, marinated roasted peppers, feta cheese, artichokes and kalamata olives, served with pita and flat breads

items.name: Antipasto Station
items.description: Italian-cured meats and cheeses, assorted grilled and marinated vegetables and imported olives, served with focaccia sticks and crostini

items.name: Sliced Filet of Beef
items.description: The finest cut of beef sliced and served with silver dollar rolls, housemade horseradish mousse and caramelized onions

items.name: Miniature Sandwiches
items.description: Two miniature sandwiches per person. Varieties: roast beef and provolone, turkey and havarti, ham and swiss

items.name: Gourmet Miniature Sandwiches
items.description: Two gourmet miniature sandwiches per person. Varieties: sliced filet of beef with horseradish mousse, smoked turkey with cranberry mayonnaise, brie with sun-dried tomatoes and fresh basil

sit_down_selections.label: Sit-Down Selections
sit_down_selections.description: Plated sit-down dinner. Price per person includes: one main item (guest's choice from below), one salad, one starch, one vegetable, rolls and butter.

selection_requirements.main_item: choose one from seafood, meat or vegetarian selections
selection_requirements.salad: choose one from sit-down salad pool
selection_requirements.starch: choose one from sit-down starch pool
selection_requirements.vegetable: choose one from sit-down vegetable pool

sit_down_selections.notes: Additional seasonal selections available. Custom pricing may apply.

salad_pool.label: Choose One Salad

duet_sit_down_selections.label: Duet Sit-Down Selections
duet_sit_down_selections.description: Two smaller protein portions served on one plate. Price per person includes: one duet combination (guest's choice), one salad, one starch, one vegetable, rolls and butter.

selection_requirements.duet_combination: choose one combination from the list below
selection_requirements.salad: choose one from sit-down salad pool (same as Sit-Down Selections)
selection_requirements.starch: choose one from sit-down starch pool (same as Sit-Down Selections)
selection_requirements.vegetable: choose one from sit-down vegetable pool (same as Sit-Down Selections)

notes: Petit filet is 4 oz. for all duet combinations.
Center cut 8 oz. filet upgrade is available for an additional $8.50 per person, for any duet combination that includes filet.
Additional menu items and seasonal selections available. Custom pricing may apply.

filet_upgrade_option.description: Center cut 8 oz. filet (upgrade from standard 4 oz. petit filet)
filet_upgrade_option.applies_to: Any duet combination that includes petit filet of beef tenderloin

buffet_dinner_selections.label: Buffet Dinner Selections
buffet_dinner_selections.description: Buffet-style service. Select one package. Price includes: 2 main items from that package (guest selects which two), one salad, two starches (from different categories), one vegetable, rolls and butter.

selection_requirements.package: choose one package (One, Two, or Three)
selection_requirements.main_items: select two items from within the chosen package
selection_requirements.starches: choose two starches from different categories (e.g., one rice + one potato)

chefs_carving_stations.label: Chef's Carving Stations
chefs_carving_stations.description: Fresh carved to order by a chef on-site. Each station serves the listed number of guests. Accompaniments are fixed — no substitution. Carving stations can be combined with other menu options.
chefs_carving_stations.notes: A professional chef is required for carving stations. Chef fee is separate (see Professional Service).

items.name: Top Round of Beef
items.description: Marinated and slow roasted

items.description: The most tender cut of beef

items.description: Marinated center-cut pork loin, rubbed with Dijon mustard

items.name: Herb Roasted Turkey
items.description: Slow roasted with Herbes de Provence

professional_service.label: Professional Service
professional_service.description: Our coordinators and catering staff will execute your plan with grace, allowing you to enjoy the event, whether you're celebrating a special occasion with family or mingling with your coworkers.
professional_service.service_scope: Service begins at load-in at The Fluted Mushroom and ends at load-out at The Fluted Mushroom.
professional_service.client_responsibility: All linens and rentals are the client's responsibility — our staff is happy to assist in any coordination needed.
professional_service.notes: All prices are subject to change.

staff_roles.description: Professional waitstaff for food and beverage service
Event coordination and overall staff supervision

bar_services.name: Full Bar Service (including alcohol)
bar_services.pricing_note: Price is determined based on the client's specific alcohol and beverage selections, quantities, and event duration. Please contact us to receive a custom quote.
bar_services.description: Full bar service including all alcohol, mixers, sodas and bar fruit — provided and managed entirely by The Fluted Mushroom

bar_services.name: Bar Service with Soda, Mixers and Bar Fruit
bar_services.description: Client provides and supplies all alcohol. The Fluted Mushroom provides soda, mixers and bar fruit, plus bartending staff.

bar_services.name: Bar Service (client provides all beverages)
bar_services.pricing_note: Client provides all alcohol AND all non-alcoholic beverages. The Fluted Mushroom provides bartending staff only. Price is based on event size, hours and number of bartenders required. Please contact us for a custom quote.
bar_services.description: Client provides both alcohol and non-alcoholic beverages. The Fluted Mushroom supplies professional bartending staff only.

disclaimers_and_policies.pricing: All prices are subject to change without notice.
disclaimers_and_policies.seasonal_items: Additional menu items and seasonal selections are available upon request.
disclaimers_and_policies.custom_menus: Custom pricing may apply to specialized or custom menus.
disclaimers_and_policies.linens_rentals: All linens and rentals are the client's responsibility. The Fluted Mushroom staff is happy to assist with coordination.
disclaimers_and_policies.service_window: Service hours begin at load-in and end at load-out at The Fluted Mushroom facility.
disclaimers_and_policies.market_price_items: Items marked as 'market price' (such as Lobster Roll) are priced according to current market conditions at time of booking. Please contact us for current pricing.
disclaimers_and_policies.general: As Pittsburgh's preferred caterer, we pride ourselves on sweating the small stuff to ensure your event is flawless, right down to the last bite.
